goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the 'west' and should be in the 'cheap' price range.
The restaurant should serve 'romanian' food.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'vietnamese' food.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'thursday' and should go to 'peterborough'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should 'arrive by 13:15'.
Make sure you get 'departure time', 'train ID', and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the west and should be in the cheap price range
The restaurant should serve romanian food
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves vietnamese food
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave on thursday and should go to peterborough
The train should depart from cambridge and should arrive by 13:15
Make sure you get departure time, train ID, and travel time
